snippets.comment: Teaching style can be difficult to understand and at time unclear.

Easy to talk to and ask for help. His time management skills aren't the best but he is fully aware of that. Gives plenty of opportunity for extra credit. If you are someone like me and you just don't get it or it never clicks for you, he's not the best at giving you reassurance or maybe a different

Easy to talk to and ask for any help. His time management isnt that great but he will tell you that. I just didn't understand anything it just didn't click for me, but he does offer quite a bit extra credit to help with grade.
